response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop facilitation, but lacks explicit evidence of people management beyond informal mentorship and no direct experience with mobile platforms or organizational change, which are key for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshop creation
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and embedded systems with strong testing focus
concerns: No documented experience in formal people management or team leadership
Lacks clear mobile platform experience (iOS/Android) despite role focus
Minimal evidence of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
